EN

杨智贤

邮寄地址：
笃学路1号，南沙区，广州市，广东省，中华人民共和国（邮政编码：511453）

我的工位：E1-4F-218

迩来仆专攻红鸟项目之构划。

🚁 其题曰：
构建城厢无人机物流之数字孪生体⛈️——破解极端天气对末端物流经济与运营之困局

🔭 项目愿景：从“可行与否”至“智能全气象运营”之飞跃
当此低空经济方兴未艾之际，无人机物流犹困于天时之桎梏。本项目破局之法，非止于“行止”之判，意在铸就智能多层数字孪生系统，使无人机于重楼叠宇间得展百变翔舞之策。
此非止工巧之技，实乃数字孪生政策实验室之创举。融高精度大气科学、稳健飞行模拟与精深城厢分析于一炉，化天地玄机为经世良策。吾辈所构，非仅避险之器，乃开 resilence 之枢，延运营之窗，拓末端物流新境，终使无人机递送成风雨无阻之良驿。

📈 项目更新（最后更新于乙巳(2025)年十一月三十日）：
惜乎前议项目因人员未备而中辍，仆今已加入季一丁博士所领之新红鸟项目。旦夕间当以此处主页布告新项详要。

流程纲目：首尾相衔之验证体系

本项目立基于技术可行之精心规划，使跨学科模块如环无端。自原始地理气象数据，终成高拟真交互数字孪生，堪为决策之明镜。

（以下皆西番英吉利文字）A detailed technical breakdown of this workflow can be found in our Feasibility & Toolchain Analysis report (中文).

（以下皆为西番英吉利文字）
🤝 Seeking Collaborators to Shape the Future of Drone Logistics:
This project is a mission to build a resilient, intelligent, and autonomous drone logistics system that can operate safely even when the weather turns bad. To achieve this, we are looking for core partners to own a critical piece of this vision. We are recruiting for the following roles:

Role Title Core Mission Ideal Background
Urban Analyst & Scenario Designer The "Question Asker" & "Value Interpreter" of the project. You will define the core urban challenges to be investigated and translate the final engineering results into meaningful economic and policy conclusions. Urban Governance & Design (UGOD), GIS, Public Policy (IPE), with a strong interest in data analysis.
The Physicist:
Atmospheric & CFD Modeler		 The "Source of Truth" for our physical world. You will generate the high-fidelity atmospheric data that forms the scientific backbone of the entire simulation, ensuring all decisions are grounded in accurate physical reality. Atmospheric Science (EOAS), CFD, Fluid Dynamics (e.g., WRF/Fluent), Sustainable Energy & Environment (SEE).
The Brain:
AI & Optimization Architect		 The architect of the project's core decision-making engine. You will design and implement the dynamic path-planning algorithms that consume rich environmental data and output the safest, most efficient flight paths. Data Science (DSA), Operations Research, Reinforcement Learning, Robotics & Autonomous Systems (ROAS), Intelligent Transport (INTR).
The World Builder:
Digital Twin & Simulation Specialist		 The master of the virtual world. You will be responsible for both building the simulation environment and visualizing the final results, transforming raw 3D models and data into a fully realized, interactive digital twin. 3D Modeling, AIGC, Robotics (ROAS), IoT, Computer Media & Arts (CMA).

（以下皆为西番英吉利文字）
💬 Interested in collaborating?
If you're excited by this challenge, you can learn more by searching my name 杨智贤 on the EPMS Dashboard. I believe we can achieve something remarkable together. Please feel free to contact me if you are interested in my research.
